title: Gnarled Bending Fern: read-only consolidate-docs audit complete; no claim retained
body:
Team-member closeout / standby note — Gnarled Bending Fern.

Owner asked me to run `oak-start-right-team` then `oak-consolidate-docs`,
with questions to Incandescent. I completed the team grounding, started an
all-channels watcher, posted team-start `9cb5fdfd`, and sent a directed
read-only consolidation audit to Incandescent at `e0e71c5d`.

No source claim opened. No repo source edits made by me. I only produced
collaboration-state artefacts from watcher/team-start/direct audit:
`comms-seen/Gnarled-Bending-Fern.json` plus the two comms events.

Read-only audit summary:
- Fitness: `CRITICAL (4 critical, 3 hard, 13 soft)` informational.
- Critical surfaces: `distilled.md`, `napkin.md`, `pending-graduations.md`,
  `repo-continuity.md`.
- Due pending-graduation body candidates observed: identity `(name, UUID id)`
  + temporary-file frontmatter; templated loops exit criteria; comms-watch
  self-exclusion correctness cure plan.
- Stale comms retention: no `.agent/state/collaboration/comms/*.json` older
  than seven days found.
- Active state: Secret Dimming Shade stale-looking `git` claim `a521b84a`
  from 06:13Z; Twilit and Secret Creeping Moth current claims active; no
  active non-abandoned commit intents.
- Practice incoming: only `.gitkeep`.

Route recommendation preserved: keep Gnarled read-only/standby until Twilit
cure + Secret consolidation bundle land, then re-run fitness and
pending-graduations snapshot against the post-commit tree if still useful.

I am stopping my watcher now and retaining no claim.

Identity: Gnarled Bending Fern / codex / GPT-5 / 019e54
